displayModule.description: Updated display module with dark ANSI backgrounds (4Xm range) and NO_COLOR support

bannerRegistrations.description: Banner registrations for previously missing review stages

noColorSupport.description: When process.env.NO_COLOR is set (any non-empty value), all ANSI escape sequences must be suppressed

darkBackgrounds.description: All background colour codes use the 40-47 range (dark), never the 100-107 range (bright)

definition.scope: Switch bright ANSI background colours to dark backgrounds for better terminal readability. Add missing banner registrations and NO_COLOR support.

tasks.description: Replace all 10Xm ANSI background codes with 4Xm equivalents
tasks.acceptance: No bright background codes remain in display.cjs

tasks.description: Add missing banner registrations for unit-test, bug-hunt, uat, bug-fix
tasks.acceptance: All four stages have registered banners
Setting NO_COLOR suppresses all ANSI output

tasks.description: Update display.test.cjs assertions for new colour codes
tasks.acceptance: All tests pass with updated assertions

acceptance: All background codes use dark (4Xm) range
